calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Perez.
Petitioners: Htien He Hum present in pro per for self and with Ngo Yon Moh, both are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Htet Kong Hum and Phyo Su Su Hum.
Mr. Htien He Hum also
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of an Adult and of two Minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of an adult to: Johnson Hum, and Change of Name of two Minors to: Nelson Hum and Susan Hum.
Decree signed in open court.
